chunks.text: MFI evolution - 01iota 01 i Date of Completion November 2001 Photo of 01-iota Description 01-iota was the first fourbar with rubber flexures for 3 of the fourbar joints. Rubber makes assembly easier, simultaneously allowing for low parallel stiffness

simultaneously allowing for low parallel stiffness. Fabrication Parameters Fourbar link lengths: 6,6,6,1 mm. Slider crank attachment point: 2 mm. Wing inertia: 20 mg-mm^2 (possibly higher due to some extra polyimide getting into the wing surface whil
extra polyimide getting into the wing surface while gluing). actuator: 10x5 PZT actuator. Performance DC motion: 20 degrees @ 180V Resonant motion: 90 degrees @ 180V Resonant frequency: 150 Hz.
